stemHtml: In relation to the wind speed and direction at the top of the friction layer, which change in wind will a pilot normally experience during descent to the surface over land in the northern hemisphere?

options.a: Backing ca. 10 degrees, speed is reduced by ca. 30%.
options.b: Backing ca. 30 degrees, speed is reduced by ca. 50%.
options.c: Veering ca. 10 degrees, speed is reduced by ca. 30%.
options.d: Veering ca. 30 degrees, speed is reduced by ca. 50%.
